title: The Second Policymakers’ seminar to review the program of  the improved vertisols management in relation to assured rainfall regions of India
abstract: The seminar was conducted to compare and exchange experiences gained in the various on-farm verification trials conducted or under way in the stages of Andhra Pradesh, Karnataka, Madhya Pradesh, and Maharashtra as part of Phase-1 (1981-83) of the action plan approved at the first Policymakers' Seminar held in Delhi on 21 May 1981...
